rationale: The citing paper is a theory paper on multiperiod quota-based sales compensation and dynamic effort gaming (e.g., hockey-stick/giving-up profiles), while the cited paper is a field study on quota-based bonus vs. commission plans with evidence on timing games and effort allocation distortions. Given this strong construct overlap in sales-incentive design and gaming behavior, the citation could plausibly be an important empirical motivation/comparison rather than an incidental mention.
